ops.body: Re-baseline note: this ticket was written against the v13 Python-primary architecture (Python walk + span-less Rust parity mirror). By fix time, main had completed the v14 inversion — cc_transcript/command.py is a facade over _native and rust/crates/core/src/command.rs is the single source of truth carrying span/Occurrence/splice. The fix therefore landed Rust-native only; the 'Rust parity golden + crate move in lockstep' concern reduced to regenerating the golden from the fixed native core in the same commit.
